testcase.name: tbl_with_pools_works_with_standard_functions_like_tbl_summary
testcase.failure:
Snapshot of code has changed: old vs new Code as.data.frame(tbl) Output - Characteristic Placebo 
N = 8 Xanomeline High Dose 
N = 11 Xanomeline Low Dose 
N = 11 Any Xanomeline 
N = 22 All Patients 
N = 30 + Characteristic Placebo 
N = 8 Xanomeline High Dose 
N = 11 Xanomeline Low Dose 
N = 11 Any Xanomeline 
N = 22 All Patients 
N = 30 - 1 Age 74<U+00A0>(64,<U+00A0>83) 61<U+00A0>(56,<U+00A0>77) 74<U+00A0>(68,<U+00A0>80) 71<U+00A0>(61,<U+00A0>79) 71<U+00A0>(61,<U+00A0>79) + 1 Age 74 (64, 83) 61 (56, 77) 74 (68, 80) 71 (61, 79) 71 (61, 79) - 2 Sex <NA> <NA> <NA> <NA> <NA> + 2 Sex <NA> <NA> <NA> <NA> <NA> - 3 F 4<U+00A0>(50.0%) 5<U+00A0>(45.5%) 3<U+00A0>(27.3%) 8<U+00A0>(36.4%) 12<U+00A0>(40.0%) + 3 F 4 (50.0%) 5 (45.5%) 3 (27.3%) 8 (36.4%) 12 (40.0%) - 4 M 4<U+00A0>(50.0%) 6<U+00A0>(54.5%) 8<U+00A0>(72.7%) 14<U+00A0>(63.6%) 18<U+00A0>(60.0%) + 4 M 4 (50.0%) 6 (54.5%) 8 (72.7%) 14 (63.6%) 18 (60.0%) * Run `testthat::snapshot_accept("tbl_with_pools", "testthat")` to accept the change. * Run `testthat::snapshot_review("tbl_with_pools", "testthat")` to review the change.

testcase.name: tbl_with_pools_passes_the_denominator_correctly_for_custom_functions
testcase.failure:
Snapshot of code has changed: old vs new Code as.data.frame(tbl) - Condition - Warning in `do.call()`: - unable to translate 'Body System or Organ Class - <U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0><U+00A0>Dictionary-Derived Term' to native encoding - Output - Body System or Organ Class
